The transit of Venus through the nine Avenues divided into
three groups, Northern, Middle and Southern, will produce in
order the following results : In the JVaga Avenue the results would
be exceedingly beneficent, in the Gaja, very good, and in the
Air aval a slight. In the next triad viz. Vrsabha, Go and Jaradgava
the effects would be in order moderate, middling and slightly
harmmful. Lastly in the Mrga, Aja and Dahana they would be
very bad (or untoward), inauspicious, and exceedingly harmful
respectively.
[Next he speaks of six Mandalas or circles of Venus and
their effects.]
